cases.name: verified-summer-offer-is-ready
cases.prompt: Plan a 20% summer sale for opted-in UK skincare customers. The discount, exclusions, expiry, landing page, sender authentication, suppression list, tracking, rendering, accessibility, and purchase-revenue KPI are verified.

cases.name: relevant-category-offer-is-ready
cases.prompt: Send a verified free-shipping offer to consented customers interested in the listed category, excluding recent purchasers. All material terms, QA, tracking, preference link, and contribution-margin KPI are complete.

cases.name: loyalty-tier-offer-is-ready
cases.prompt: Email consented gold-tier members about a verified early-access offer. Eligibility, inventory, price, expiry, exclusions, sender setup, QA, links, and conversion event are verified; the audience is being ramped gradually.

cases.name: seasonal-offer-with-controlled-test-is-ready
cases.prompt: Launch a consented seasonal offer with verified terms and an accessible landing page. A small segment will test one subject-line framing variable using revenue per recipient; all send QA and exclusions are complete.

cases.name: geo-targeted-promotion-is-ready
cases.prompt: Send a verified local-store promotion only to permissioned recipients in the confirmed eligible geography. The offer, expiry, exclusions, preference option, QA, conversion event, and margin guardrail are all verified.

cases.name: unverified-discount-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Send a flash-sale email claiming 50% off, but the merchandising team has not confirmed the price, inventory, or expiry. Recipients have marketing permission.

cases.name: non-opener-resend-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Yesterday's sale email had low opens. Automatically resend it today only to non-openers with the subject 'Last chance' although no new deadline exists.

cases.name: address-list-without-consent-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Promote a new product to a partner-provided address list. The addresses exist, but the team cannot verify permission for this marketing purpose or suppression status.

cases.name: suppressed-recent-purchaser-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Send a first-purchase discount to every email address in the CRM, including an unsubscribed customer who bought the product yesterday.

cases.name: missing-send-qa-holds
cases.prompt: The offer and consented segment are verified, but mobile rendering, link validation, and personalization fallbacks have not been checked.

cases.name: click-only-success-metric-holds
cases.prompt: All offer facts and QA pass, but the team will choose the winner solely by open rate and has no conversion, revenue, or margin measure.

cases.name: missing-eligibility-terms-holds
cases.prompt: The sale price and expiry are verified, but the team has not determined which customer segments are eligible or whether exclusions apply.
